instruction: Enter the interview results into the interview ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Interview Record
Candidate: Pan Xuemei
Position Applied: Senior Data Analyst
Interview Date: 2025-03-13
Interviewers: HR Director Deng Min, Tech Director Qi Hao
Interview Round: Second Round
Technical Score: 88
Overall Score: 85
Conclusion: Recommend Hire
Expected Salary: 25000 CNY/month' > /home/user/Desktop/interview_record.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Candidate'; ws['B1'] = 'Position'; ws['C1'] = 'Interview Date'; ws['D1'] = 'Round'; ws['E1'] = 'Overall Score'; ws['F1'] = 'Conclusion'; ws['G1'] = 'Salary(CNY/month)'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/interview_log.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Enter the interview results into the interview ledger

Fill the interview information from /home/user/Desktop/interview_record.txt into /home/user/Desktop/interview_log.xlsx row 2: A2='Pan Xuemei', B2='Senior Data Analyst', C2='2025-03-13', D2='Second Round', E2=85, F2='Recommend Hire', G2=25000, save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/interview_log.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'Pan Xuemei' in s else 'FAILED')"
